title: Republican senator criticizes Trump’s ‘holy war’ with Pope Leo
description: Senator John Kennedy of Louisiana, a long supporter of Trump, says president’s feud with the pope is a ‘distraction’
content:
A Republican lawmaker has condemned what he refers to as Donald Trump’s “holy war” against Pope Leo XIV.
Senator John Kennedy of Louisiana, a long supporter of Trump and the ultraconservative Maga movement, condemned the president’s attacks on the po... [2498 chars]

title: Erling Haaland sinks Arsenal to give Manchester City edge in title race
description: Manchester City beat Arsenal 2-1 to trail the leaders by three points with a game in hand thanks to Erling Haaland’s second-half winner
content: The margins were always likely to be tight. In the event, with so much on the line, namely the possible destination of the Premier League title, they were excruciatingly so. It was a day when the division’s heavyweights went toe-to-toe and served up ... [5761 chars]

title: Ukraine police chief resigns after officers allegedly fled deadly shooting
description: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.
content:
The head of Ukraine's patrol police, Yevhen Zhukov, has resigned after two of his officers faced criticism for allegedly fleeing a deadly mass shooting in the capital, Kyiv.
Six people died and 14 others were injured on Saturday after a man opened fi... [3591 chars]

title: Odegaard: “We have to take the positives”
description: The skipper looks ahead after frustrating defeat to Manchester City
content:
Martin Odegaard was left to bemoan ‘small margins’ making the difference in our defeat to Manchester City in Sunday’s top-of-the-table clash.
We hit both posts at the Etihad Stadium, and Kai Havertz also came close twice as we piled on the pressure i... [1334 chars]

title: Report: Former WCW star "Heavy Metal" Van Hammer has passed away
description: The latest WWE and AEW backstage wrestling news, rumors, opinions, and special features.
content:
According to Marc Mero, former WCW star “Heavy Metal” Van Hammer (real name Mark Hildreth) has passed away at the age of 66. Mero stated the following in a post via Twitter/X…
